article.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 36 points in his return after missing nine games with an abdominal strain and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Denver Nuggets 127-121 in overtime Friday night in
article.headline: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 36 in return, tempers flare as Thunder top Nuggets 127-121 in OT

images.caption: Alex Caruso joins the "Inside the NBA" crew and talks about the biggest adjustment of being champions.
images.name: Alex Caruso: We know teams are trying to knock us off our spot

article.linkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 36 in return, tempers flare as Thunder top Nuggets 127-121 in OT
article.story: OKLAHOMA CITY -- — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 36 points in his return after missing nine games with an abdominal strain and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Denver Nuggets 127-121 in overtime Friday night in a testy matchup that featured multiple technical fouls and an ejection. Gilgeous-Alexander, the reigning MVP, didn't play in overtime, but the Thunder still pulled through in the extra period. Denver's Nikola Jokic, who got into an altercation with Oklahoma City's Lu Dort in the fourth quarter, had 23 points, 17 rebounds and 14 assists. Dort was ejected for a Flagrant 2 foul. Nuggets guard Jamal Murray, listed as questionable with an illness before the game, led the Nuggets with 39 points. Gilgeous-Alexander started and drew loud applause when his name was announced in pregame introductions. His first basket came on a driving layup two minutes into the game. The teams are very familiar with each other — the Thunder defeated the Nuggets 4-3 in the Western Conference semifinals last year. The Thunder won the first two meetings this season and they play twice more. This matchup was physical from the start. Gilgeous-Alexander was called for an early technical because he threw the ball at Jokic, who made contact with him after play stopped. Denver's bench was called for a technical in the third quarter. There was plenty of talking and shoving throughout. Gilgeous-Alexander scored 18 points in the first half, but Denver led 59-50 after making 11 of 20 3-pointers before the break. Gilgeous-Alexander scored 14 points in the third quarter to help the Thunder chip away, but the Nuggets took an 83-77 lead into the fourth. The Thunder started off hot in the fourth quarter, and Dort's 3-pointer finally put Oklahoma City up 86-85. A few minutes later, Dort was ejected for a hard foul against Jokic that led to a scrum near midcourt and offsetting technicals on Jokic and Oklahoma City's Jaylin Williams. Fittingly, the tightly contested game went to overtime tied at 107. Up next Nuggets: Host Minnesota on Sunday. Thunder: At Dallas on Sunday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/NBA

images.caption: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and the Thunder enter the playoffs as the favorites to win it all.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.caption: Jayson Tatum averaged 21.8 PPG in 16 regular-season games leading up to the playoffs.
images.credit: Nathaniel S. Butler/NBAE via Getty Images
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Los Angeles Lakers guard Austin Reaves (15) shoots over Minnesota Timberwolves center Naz Reid (11) during game 5 of the first round of the NBA Western Conference Playoffs between the Minnesota Timberwolves and the Los Angeles Lakers on April 30, 2025.
images.caption: The Lakers miss the perimeter shooting that Austin Reaves provides.
images.name: Austin Reaves [1296x729]

images.alt: Luka Doncic #77 of the Los Angeles Lakers handles the ball during the game against the Miami Heat on March 19, 2026 at Kaseya Center in Miami, Florida.
images.caption: The Lakers' championship odds are on the move again after Luka Doncic's injury.
images.name: Luka Doncic [1296x729]

images.alt: Los Angeles Lakers forward LeBron James (23) scores on a breakaway dunk during the first half of an NBA basketball game against the Orlando Magic, Saturday, March 21, 2026, in Orlando, Fla.
images.caption: LeBron James and the Lakers are on a roll as March winds down.
images.name: LeBron James  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs handles the ball during the game against the Detroit Pistons on March 5, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 and Devin Vassell #24 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the New Orleans Pelicans on January 25, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Cade Cunningham #2 of the Detroit Pistons handles the ball during the game against the Denver Nuggets on February 3, 2026 at Little Caesars Arena in Detroit, Michigan.
images.name: Cade Cunningham [1296x729]

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Even after a rough stretch of games, the Thunder remain the heavy favorites to win the NBA championship.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.
images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.
images.name: Jaylen Brown [1296x729]

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.
images.caption: Jamal Murray has led the Nuggets while Nikola Jokic recovers from injury.
images.name: Jamal Murray  [1296x729]

videos.description: Denver Nuggets vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights
videos.headline: Denver Nuggets vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Denver Nuggets vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Nikola Jokic makes an impressive basket plus the foul.
videos.headline: Jokic kisses the ball high off-the-glass for a Nuggets and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jokic kisses the ball high off-the-glass for a Nuggets and-1) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander sets up Isaiah Hartenstein beautifully for a Thunder basket.
videos.headline: Isaiah Hartenstein rises for a two-handed slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Isaiah Hartenstein rises for a two-handed slam) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Nikola Jokic finds Christian Braun for a layup plus the foul.
videos.headline: Jokic outlets to Braun for a Nuggets and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jokic outlets to Braun for a Nuggets and-1) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Nikola Jokic fouls Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, and Gilgeous-Alexander reacts by hurling the basketball at Jokic.
videos.headline: SGA receives technical for throwing basketball at Jokic

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA receives technical for throwing basketball at Jokic) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Nikola Jokic and Luguentz Dort engage in a shoving match to shake free from each other.
videos.headline: Jokic and Dort get tangled up

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jokic and Dort get tangled up) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Jamal Murray comes off a screen and drains a 3-pointer.
videos.headline: Jamal Murray splashes a 3 for the Nuggets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jamal Murray splashes a 3 for the Nuggets) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Chet Holmgren cuts to the basket for a Thunder dunk.
videos.headline: Chet Holmgren sneaks in for a slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chet Holmgren sneaks in for a slam) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Jamal Murray sees an opening and throws it down for the Nuggets.
videos.headline: Jamal Murray flies in for a flush

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jamal Murray flies in for a flush) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Luguentz Dort assessed a flagrant foul 2 and subsequently ejected for hip shot on Nikola Jokic.
videos.headline: Lu Dort ejected after flagrant foul on Jokic

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Lu Dort ejected after flagrant foul on Jokic) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Christian Braun perfectly times his contest to block Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's jumper.
videos.headline: Christian Braun rises for a crucial SGA rejection

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Christian Braun rises for a crucial SGA rejection) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Cason Wallace races down the court for a two-handed slam.
videos.headline: Cason Wallace drives and elevates for a Thunder dunk

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cason Wallace drives and elevates for a Thunder dunk) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Nuggets-Thunder heads to overtime as Alex Caruso's shot is off the mark.
videos.headline: Nuggets force OT with good defense

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Nuggets force OT with good defense) 2026/02/28 ESHEET
